summary: PR #2497 modified src/melee/lb/lbheap.c to improve lbheap matching, especially lbHeap_80015900, while preserving lbHeap_80015F3C as matched. The diff adds named local structs and inline helpers for heap reset/create/destroy handling, rewrites heap bounds scanning, and changes lbHeap_80015F3C descriptor traversal from index-based table access to pointer iteration. The PR body reports ninja and targeted checkdiff verification; the bot report confirms lbHeap_80015F3C reached 100% and lbHeap_80015900 improved to 96.48%. No human review comments are present in the loaded slice.

key_files.role: Only changed source file; contains lbheap matching cleanup, local heap helper additions, bounds scan rewrite, and lbHeap_80015F3C traversal changes.

raw_diff: lbHeap_80015F3C uses desc pointer iteration and lbHeap_ResetHeap calls

what_changed.text: Named the previously anonymous heap descriptor struct as struct lbHeap_HeapDesc and declared lbHeap_803BA380 as an array of that type.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: anonymous struct replaced by struct lbHeap_HeapDesc and struct lbHeap_HeapDesc lbHeap_803BA380[5]

what_changed.text: Added struct lbHeap_HeapOffsetView with pad[0x10] and a struct Heap member, plus lbHeap_GetHeapOffsetView(offset) to view heap records at byte offsets from lbHeap_80431FA0.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: struct lbHeap_HeapOffsetView and lbHeap_GetHeapOffsetView macro

what_changed.text: Factored repeated heap initialization into static inline lbHeap_ResetHeap and used it six times in lbHeap_80015F3C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbHeap_ResetHeap definition
raw_diff: lbHeap_80015F3C replaces for-loop field assignments with six lbHeap_ResetHeap calls

what_changed.text: Factored repeated transient heap destroy/create logic into static inline lbHeap_DestroyOffsetViewIfCreated and lbHeap_CreateOffsetViewIfDestroyed, called from lbHeap_80015900 loops.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbHeap_DestroyOffsetViewIfCreated definition
raw_diff: lbHeap_CreateOffsetViewIfDestroyed definition
raw_diff: lbHeap_80015900 destroy/create loops call the helpers through offset views

what_changed.text: Reworked lbHeap_80015900 heap bounds scan from a previously noted incorrect loop into a two-pass loop that covers heap indices 2-5 via bounds_heap = &heap_array[bounds_i * 2 - 2] and bounds_heap++.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: fixes the heap bounds scan to cover heaps 2-5
raw_diff: removed @todo noting old loop checked heaps incorrectly
raw_diff: for (bounds_i = 2; bounds_i < 4; bounds_i++) with bounds_heap and bounds_heap++

what_changed.text: Changed arena and ARAM bounds locals in lbHeap_80015900 from pointer-typed u32* locals to u32 address values with casts at call sites.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: u32* arena/aram locals replaced by u32 arena_lo, aram_lo, aram_hi, arena_hi
raw_diff: HSD_CreateMainHeap and lbMemory_800154D4 receive casts to void*

what_changed.text: Changed lbHeap_80015F3C descriptor table traversal from integer index i to struct lbHeap_HeapDesc* desc pointer iteration.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: int i replaced by struct lbHeap_HeapDesc* desc
raw_diff: desc = lbHeap_803BA380; while ((curr_idx = desc->idx) != 6); desc++

smart_moves.text: Used local static inline helpers to express repeated heap reset/create/destroy behavior instead of duplicating field assignments and branch bodies at each call site.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbHeap_ResetHeap, lbHeap_DestroyOffsetViewIfCreated, lbHeap_CreateOffsetViewIfDestroyed
human_pr_text: factors repeated heap create/destroy setup through local helpers

smart_moves.text: Kept verification narrow by naming ninja plus checkdiff for the two touched matching targets, lbHeap_80015900 and lbHeap_80015F3C.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Verification lists ninja, python tools/checkdiff.py lbHeap_80015900, python tools/checkdiff.py lbHeap_80015F3C

smart_moves.text: Used more role-specific locals in lbHeap_80015900, including destroy_view, bounds_heap, create_view, main_heap, and aram_heap, making pointer roles clearer than repeated global heap_array expressions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbHeap_80015900 local declarations and subsequent use

decomp_lessons.lesson: When repeated heap setup or teardown blocks appear in multiple places, try small local static inline helpers that preserve the original branch behavior while improving source structure and matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: repeated reset fields factored into lbHeap_ResetHeap
raw_diff: destroy/create branches factored into lbHeap_DestroyOffsetViewIfCreated and lbHeap_CreateOffsetViewIfDestroyed
human_pr_text: factors repeated heap create/destroy setup through local helpers

decomp_lessons.lesson: For table-driven setup code, pointer iteration over descriptor structs can be a viable matching shape compared with indexing every field through table[i].
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbHeap_80015F3C changes i/table[i] access to desc pointer access
human_pr_text: keeps lbHeap_80015F3C at 100%
text_corpus: bot report shows lbHeap_80015F3C 96.29% to 100.00%

decomp_lessons.lesson: Bounds-scan cleanup should preserve the intended index coverage; here the PR explicitly replaced an acknowledged incorrect scan with logic covering heaps 2-5.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: fixes the heap bounds scan to cover heaps 2-5
raw_diff: removed @todo describing old incorrect loop
raw_diff: new bounds_i loop visits pairs starting at heap_array[2] and heap_array[4], then increments to adjacent heaps
